summary: All five anchor sets refined. Set A (T94 Fig. 2 CHH): pixel detection, spot-check confirmed. Set B (T94 Fig. 2 CVV): pixel detection, spot-check confirmed at 3 rows. Set C (T94 Fig. 7 CHH at theta=30 deg): HUMAN TRANSCRIPTION (detection fell back per continuation-prompt clause — spec marker mapping inconsistent with T94 caption, and five-marker template detection was low confidence on overlapping clusters). Set D (M90 Fig. 10): line-continuity detection of MIMICS curves; spec's original 'open-circle markers' description is materially incorrect (circles are VV Measured, not VV MIMICS) — MIMICS values are drawn as LINES. Set E (T94 Tables IV(a) + V(a)): text extraction via pdftotext, no pixels. Matches spec exactly.

M90.note: DOI typo in DEV-1b-003; PDF metadata is authoritative. Non-blocking.

set_A.description: T94 Fig. 2 CHH panel (page 49, bottom-left). Wheat, site #13, 18 July 1988, C-band HH.

set_B.description: T94 Fig. 2 CVV panel (page 49, bottom-right). Same inputs as Set A; polarisation VV.

spot_check.human_answer_B.2: one hollow and one filled at ~-10, overlapping
spot_check.human_answer_B.3: hollow just under -10 but not quite -11; filled ~-11
spot_check.human_answer_B.4: hollow significantly lower at ~-14; Brewster drop confirmed
spot_check.verdict: confirmed at all three checked rows

rows.note: spec v0.1 estimate of -12.5 was off the filled (measured) marker; refined value on the hollow (MIMICS) marker.

set_C.description: T94 Fig. 7 CHH panel (page 54, bottom-left). Five scattering-mechanism decomposition plus total sigma-zero. All read at theta=30 deg.
set_C.method: HUMAN TRANSCRIPTION (v1 fallback per continuation-prompt Step 3 fallback clause)
set_C.fallback_reason: Pixel-detection pipeline produced low-confidence reads because (a) g2_anchor_spec.md v0.1 marker-to-mechanism mapping conflicted with the T94 Fig. 7 caption's legend (C.3/C.4 marker types are swapped between spec and caption; see notes_v0.2 below), and (b) the middle cluster near -20 to -22 dB has at least two hollow-square-like markers in very close proximity that template scoring could not reliably distinguish.

C.3_cover_ground.note: NOT VISIBLE in the CHH panel at theta=30. Likely coincident with other markers at -20 dB, or the mechanism is negligible at CHH theta=30 for this canopy. Row dropped from v0.2 anchor set with a DEV note (see DEV-1b-003 Appendix).

C.4_ground_cover.note: Filled square sits under open square (C.2 Direct cover) at the same dB ~ -20.

C.5_ground_cover_ground.note: Spec estimate of -40 with 2.0 dB tolerance would not capture the true -35 dB; this is a real anchor correction, not a noise-level difference.

set_D.description: M90 Fig. 10 (page 487). Walnut orchard, L-band multiangle. MIMICS-modelled sigma-zero at theta=40 deg and 55 deg, HH and VV.

spec_correction.v0.1_language: 'open-circle markers (labelled VV MIMICS and HH MIMICS)'
spec_correction.actual_figure_semantics: MIMICS output is drawn as LINES (solid=VV, dotted=HH, dashed=HV). Markers represent MEASURED values (open-circle VV Measured, open-square HH Measured, open-triangle HV Measured). Spec v0.1 was materially incorrect; v0.2 corrects it.

rows.method: column-darkness histogram; dotted line at y=548 (dB=-11.73), present in 55% of 71 sampled columns right of marker
column-darkness histogram; dotted line at y=532 (dB=-11.30), present in 46% of 24 sampled columns left of marker
rows.confidence: medium (dotted line intermittent; fewer samples available because MIMICS curves end at theta=55)

rows.method: column-darkness histogram; solid line at y=564 (dB=-12.17), present in 56% of 71 sampled columns
column-darkness histogram; solid line at y=564 (dB=-12.17), present in 100% of 24 sampled columns

set_E.description: T94 Table V(a) (wheat L-band, page 57) and Table IV(a) reference cover (page 51). Sensitivity coefficients d(sigma-zero)/dP * zeta in dB.

rows.source: T94 Table V(a) page 57, L band, VV column at theta=30, row 'm_v +/-0.04 g/cm3'
T94 Table V(a) page 57, L band, HH column at theta=30, row 'm_v +/-0.04 g/cm3'
T94 Table V(a) page 57, L band, VV column at theta=30, row 'h +/-0.05 m'
T94 Table V(a) page 57, L band, HH column at theta=30, row 'h +/-0.05 m'
T94 Table V(a) page 57, L band, HH column at theta=30, row 'w +/-0.5 cm'

largest_deltas.note: spec -40 dB, actual -35 dB; real correction
spec -22 dB, actual -20 dB (filled-square sits at same dB as open-square)
spec read off wrong marker (filled instead of hollow)
